category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a small HTTP/1.1 server; NetBSD bozohttpd(8) manual describes it as an HTTP daemon.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is bozohttpd; NetBSD manual title uses bozohttpd(8).
docs_sources: Official NetBSD manual page is the primary command documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official package/homepage sources provide release archives and manual documentation but no official source-control project URL was confirmed.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists bozohttpd; source_facts.description and NetBSD manual identify HTTP server/daemon behavior.
